overview: Production-grade mobile banking web app for Bawjiase Community Bank (BCB), Ghana. Features full authentication, account management, transfers, payments, loans, and more — all with BCB's green brand identity.
features: Animated splash screen with BCB logo
Login with any phone number + PIN + OTP simulation
Payments: utilities (ECG/water), TV subscriptions, airtime and data
Full transaction history with search, filter, and receipt download
Card management: virtual card, freeze/unfreeze, spending limits
Loan application, approval tracker, and repayment schedule
Profile with KYC upload, PIN change, dark mode, and auto-logout
GHS currency with Ghana-specific providers throughout
